creator: inbox@alleghenycomputer.com
text:
Did some more digging and I found there was a bug in www/p5-libwww v6.63 causing this issue.

Luckily, a newer version (v6.64) showed up in the ports tree yesterday which is supposed to fix this issue.

I am updating everything and will report back and close this if all goes well - as I suspect it will.
